turns.text: why do hospital pharmacists need to be versitile

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Hospital pharmacists need to be versatile because they are required to perform various roles and responsibilities, ranging from dispensing and reviewing medications to collaborating with other healthcare professionals in patient care. They must possess strong communication and organizational skills, as well as the ability to adapt to changes in medication prescriptions, patient conditions, and treatment plans. Additionally, hospital pharmacists may also be involved in medication safety initiatives, research, and education, further highlighting the importance of versatility in their profession.
